"Die Welt braucht keine neuen Atommächte" 

Das stimmt; aber die Welt braucht nicht nur weniger Atomwaffen, sondern deren vollständige Abschaffung. 

Iran strebt aufgrund seiner Geschichte, seiner Zivilisation und seiner religiösen Grundlagen keine Atomwaffen an. Wenn nukleare Abrüstung also ernst gemeint ist, muss sie bei Israelischem Regime beginnen – einem Regime mit einem nuklearen Arsenal, außerhalb des NVV (Nichtverbreitungsvertrag), und verantwortlich für Angriffe auf friedliche iranische Nuklearanlagen, die jedoch nicht verurteilt wurden. 

Echte Sicherheit ist mit doppelten Standards nicht möglich.
#Nein_zu_Nuklearwaffen #Nuklearenergie #Kernenergie

In an interview with #AlMayadeen English, Professor and Dean of Iqra University #Islamabad Campus H-9, Dr. Eatzaz Ahmed, discusses why many Iranian poets, philosophers, and political thinkers connect with Allama Iqbal's work. 

Dr. Ahmed explained that Iqbal "wrote for the #Muslim community," adding that his general audience was the entire Muslim community, especially Central Asia, West Asia, South Asia, and even the Far East, Indonesia, and Malaysia. 

Affirming that the #Persian language is indeed one of the reasons why Iranians connected to Iqbal's work, Dr. Ahmed explained that Iqbal's overall ideology was "highly appealing." 

Watch the full interview on our YouTube Channel: https://t.co/4GiFN7bk1Q

@karimsh89 

#Pakistan #WestAsia

Lebanon's Minister of Health, Rakan Nasseredine, condemned "in the strongest terms" the Israeli occupation's direct targeting of Lebanese Civil Defense paramedics. 

He said that the death toll among health sector personnel has risen to 103 martyrs since March 2.

The minister stressed that targeting paramedics constitutes a blatant violation of international norms and conventions, and a direct challenge to the Geneva Conventions.

Nasseredine called on international and UN organizations to break their silence over this systematic escalation, stressing that silence in the face of attacks on first responders strikes at the very core of humanitarian values.

#Lebanon #LebanonUnderAttack #AlMayadeen

The Israeli violation of the ceasefire in Lebanon continues, and so does its brutality in the South, as it continues to attack towns and villages and demolish civilian infrastructure. 

#Lebanon's National News Agency (NNA) reported that Israeli warplanes attacked the southern Lebanese towns of #Baraachit and #Shaqra with phosphorus, an internationally banned weapon. 

The agency added that one martyr was retrieved from beneath the rubble in #Tebnin, while two martyrs were retrieved from the targeted house in Shaqra.
